'''kamate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vaginally|vaginally]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-m-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vaginally|vaginally]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kamate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:kamate|kamate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kamatesher|kamatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kamatesherĂ«m|kamatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kamatero|kamatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kamateshĂ«|kamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kamateshĂ«m|kamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikamatero|gokikamatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikamateshĂ«|gokikamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikamateshĂ«m|gokikamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokamankerom|gokamankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokamankeshĂ«|gokamankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokamankeshĂ«m|gokamankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokamankeya|gokamankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kamaterom|kamaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kamatemu|kamatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kamateya|kamateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikamaterom|gokikamaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikamatemu|gokikamatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikamateya|gokikamateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:kamamate|kamamate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kamamatesher|kamamatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kamamatesherĂ«m|kamamatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kamamatero|kamamatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kamamateshĂ«|kamamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kamamateshĂ«m|kamamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikamamatero|gokikamamatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikamamateshĂ«|gokikamamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikamamateshĂ«m|gokikamamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokamamankerom|gokamamankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokamamankeshĂ«|gokamamankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokamamankeshĂ«m|gokamamankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokamamankeya|gokamamankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kamamaterom|kamamaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kamamatemu|kamamatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kamamateya|kamamateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikamamaterom|gokikamamaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikamamatemu|gokikamamatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikamamateya|gokikamamateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:kĂŠmĂŠte|kĂŠmĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kĂŠmĂŠtesher|kĂŠmĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠmĂŠtesherĂ«m|kĂŠmĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kĂŠmĂŠtero|kĂŠmĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«|kĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m|kĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikĂŠmĂŠtero|gokikĂŠmĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«|gokikĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m|gokikĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokĂŠmĂŠnkerom|gokĂŠmĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«|gokĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gokĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokĂŠmĂŠnkeya|gokĂŠmĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kĂŠmĂŠterom|kĂŠmĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠmĂŠtemu|kĂŠmĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kĂŠmĂŠteya|kĂŠmĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikĂŠmĂŠterom|gokikĂŠmĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikĂŠmĂŠtemu|gokikĂŠmĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikĂŠmĂŠteya|gokikĂŠmĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:kafmafte|kafmafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kafmaftesher|kafmaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafmaftesherĂ«m|kafmaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kafmaftero|kafmaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kafmafteshĂ«|kafmafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafmafteshĂ«m|kafmafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikafmaftero|gokikafmaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikafmafteshĂ«|gokikafmafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafmafteshĂ«m|gokikafmafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokafmafnkerom|gokafmafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokafmafnkeshĂ«|gokafmafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokafmafnkeshĂ«m|gokafmafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokafmafnkeya|gokafmafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kafmafterom|kafmafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafmaftemu|kafmaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kafmafteya|kafmafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikafmafterom|gokikafmafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafmaftemu|gokikafmaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikafmafteya|gokikafmafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
